nodes.name: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克
nodes.summary: 昆拉德·雅各布·特明克是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联18种鸟类，包括大美洲鸵、黑脸琵鹭、Malayan crested fireback等18种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 巴里桑山脈
nodes.summary: 巴里桑山脈是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Sumatran green pigeon，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Sumatran green pigeon
nodes.summary: Sumatran green pigeon（Sumatran green pigeon，学名 Treron oxyurus），分类上属于鸽形目，并归入鸠鸽科，在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，已关联4个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 爪哇岛
nodes.summary: 爪哇岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联12种鸟类，包括绿孔雀、Moustached hawk-cuckoo、八声杜鹃等12种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 鸠鸽科
nodes.summary: 鸠鸽科（Columbidae）是图谱中的科级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联210种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等210种鸟类。

nodes.name: 鸽形目
nodes.summary: 鸽形目（Columbiformes）是图谱中的目级分类节点，当前关联299种鸟类，如Purple-winged ground dove、Moreno's ground dove、Black-winged ground dove等299种鸟类。

nodes.name: 蘇門答臘島
nodes.summary: 蘇門答臘島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联21种鸟类，包括罗氏山鹧鸪、蘇門答臘山鷓鴣、長嘴山鶉等21种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: First described by the Dutch zoologist Coenraad Jacob Temminck in 1823, it is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in Sumatra and western Java

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: First described by the Dutch zoologist Coenraad Jacob Temminck in 1823, it is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in Sumatra and western Java

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: First described by the Dutch zoologist Coenraad Jacob Temminck in 1823, it is endemic to Indonesia, where it is found in Sumatra and western Java

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: On Sumatra, it is found in the Barisan Mountains, as well as some other parts of the island, while on Java, it is found in the western mountains east to Mount Papandayan

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits the canopy of dense hill and montane forest and has been recorded at elevations of on Sumatra and on Java

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The Sumatran green pigeon is listed as near-threatened on the IUCN Red List due to a "moderately small" population that is continuing to decline because of habitat degradation

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Forest loss due to logging and fires has been extensive in the pigeon's range, especially at lower elevations, leading to a patchy distribution

links.label: 属于
links.evidence: Wikidata 分类: Sumatran green pigeon 属于目 鸽形目。

links.label: 属于
